targets.query:
from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cell_kpi" and r._field == "prb_dl_pct") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.generation == "${generation}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cell_kpi" and r._field == "sinr_db") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.generation == "${generation}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)

  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cell_kpi" and r._field == "bler_pct") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.generation == "${generation}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cell_kpi" and r._field == "latency_ms") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.generation == "${generation}")
